element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Available as fallback when ammunition depleted
Core combat mechanic, requires ammunition conservation
Stage-gating mechanic; specific remotes required to progress through certain stages
Active threat; health rapidly drains when timer expires
Particularly enormous or swift enemies; culmination of stage challenges
Alternative level type requiring different skill application

element_introduction_order.element: Multiple world environments (domed cities, hives, biomechanical, temples, magma)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Varied setting types introduce thematic and mechanical diversity

typical_relief_triggers: Acquiring appropriate remote gadget for stage progression
typical_tension_triggers: Stage-gating remote gadget requirement unknown or unavailable
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Push-forward momentum with escalating pressure; time limits create constant tension; stage variety prevents rhythm predictability

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction of basic combat (punch, gun) and time limit pressure; establishing core mechanics
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Remote gadget acquisition and stage-gating; increased enemy difficulty and environment complexity
difficulty_curve.late_game: Boss encounters at world transitions; cart-race levels; multiple environment types; cumulative skill mastery required
notable_spikes: Final world transition requiring advanced remote mastery

notable_level_patterns.description: Three distinct worlds each containing varied setting types: domed space colony cities, large alien hive-type areas, strange biomechanical facilities, ancient haunted temples, and cavernous magma chambers
Specific gadget remotes (trampoline, helicopter, etc.) required to complete certain stages; forces stage-by-stage equipment discovery and planning
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Stages requiring specific remote gadget to progress

notable_level_patterns.description: Each world ends with boss encounter; notable for being particularly enormous or swift enemies; marks world completion and triggers narrative advancement
Alternative level type interrupting standard platforming; appears in mid-to-late game; requires different skill application than standard run-and-gun stages
